---
applyTo: '**'
---
Code Guidelines:
- dont use any frameworks
- use simple css
- use css variables for colors and spacings to make it adjustable
- use vanilla js
- use php & mysql for backend if needed
- make sure the code is well commented
- ensure the site is accessible (ARIA roles, alt texts, keyboard navigation)
- optimize for performance (minimize load times, optimize images)
- ensure cross-browser compatibility (test on major browsers)
- follow best practices for SEO (semantic HTML, meta tags)
- implement responsive design (mobile-friendly, adaptable layouts)
